name: Koguma
description: Koguma is a taciturn young girl that gains friends, self-confidence, and the thrill of adventure after purchasing her Super Cub. Koguma's father died when she was young and her mother left when she entered high school. She doesn't have any other relatives and lives by herself. She also doesn't have any hobbies or any friends and is quite unnoticeable at school.

name: Tadakuni
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7") Tadakuni is a student in Sanada North Boys High who acts as the straight man of the group. He is usually involved in [Hidenori Tabata](https://anilist.co/character/50691) and [Yoshitake Tanaka](https://anilist.co/character/50693)'s wild ideas despite his disapproval. He has a younger sister who proves to be stronger than him and his friends. Gradually, he loses screen time and fades into the background, appearing even less than supporting characters.

description: Bunji Kugashira earned the nickname "Madness" for his skills as a killer. He is an expert both with guns and unarmed. He also has a strange sense of morals. He deems it fine to kill others as a hitman, but he has a strong sense of loyalty to his friends and coworkers. Bunji first meets Harry MacDowell on a job to kill him. name: Hua Fu
